title: Resolution Approving and Adopting Municipal Anti-drug Abuse Council (MADAC) Resolution No. 2022-08 Dated September 19, 2022 Entitled ?resolution Approving the Establishment and Operation of the Special Drug Education Center (SDEC) to Be Lodged at the Yakap Bayan Center Building in the Municipality of Los Baños, Laguna, Providing Funds Thereof and for Other Purposes.?
